POL.Name: neg_bo
POL.Comment: DEF: RECODE NEGATIVE INCOMES TO ZERO

POL.Name: tscee_bo
POL.Comment: SIC: Employee Social Insurance Contributions (Aportaciones personales a las Administradoras de Fondos de Pensiones)

POL.Name: tscse_bo
POL.Comment: SIC: Self-employed Social Insurance Contributions (Aportaciones personales Auto Empleo a las Adminitradoras de Fondos de Pensiones)

POL.Name: tva_bo
POL.Comment: TAX: Value Added Tax (IVA) - All goods and services except imports

POL.Name: tex_bo
POL.Comment: TAX: Special Consumption Tax - Excise and ad valorem (Impuesto a los Consumos Speciales)

POL.Name: tinpr_bo
POL.Comment: TAX: Transaction Tax (Impuesto a las transacciones)

POL.Name: bfaot_bo
POL.Comment: BEN: Family Bond (Estudiantes) COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

POL.Name: bcaot_bo
POL.Comment: BEN: Family Basket (Beneficiarios BJA y RD) COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

POL.Name: bwkot_bo
POL.Comment: BEN: Universal Bond for people not enroled in other benefits (BJA, BJP, RD, BF, CF) COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

POL.Name: brwot_bo
POL.Comment: BEN: Bono contra el Hambre (Reactivación Económica) POST COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

POL.Name: xhhadj_bo
POL.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Retain original value of self-employed income

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: RC-IVA Salaried worker with no taxable non-labor income

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: RC-IVA Salaried worker with taxable non-labor income

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: RC-IVA Independent worker with taxable non-labor income

FUN.Name: DefVar
FUN.Comment: Base income for National Solidarity Contribution (Aporte Nacional Solidario)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Calculate total VAT paid on standard rates items by each household

FUN.Name: Allocate
FUN.Comment: Allocate VAT within the household proportionally to earnings

FUN.Name: BenCalc
FUN.Comment: Allocate level of VAT payments for the purpose of personal income tax payments

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income accounting for in-kind benefits

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: All SIC Pension and AFP Contributions

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social Security Contributions (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Child benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social Assistance benefits (feed into Statistic Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Orphan/Widows benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disability benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Unemployment benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal consumption (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Simulated consumption (needed for Statistics Presenter - do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal income taking into account own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Agricultural benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect taxes (“Indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Per capita equivalence scale (same as national)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 13 - Personal care, social protection and miscellaneous goods and services

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 02 - Alcoholic beverages, tobacco, and narcotics

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: COICOP 04 - Housing, water, electricity, gas and other fuels

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: Specify share of own-account produced that is protected from changes

PAR.Name: bfacc
PAR.Comment: Maternity Leave Bonus (Subsidio de lactancia) Sólo para 2015

PAR.Name: xogtb
PAR.Comment: Gastos 2019 en Tabaco está incluido en Bebidas Alcohólicas (xal)

PAR.Name: xogog
PAR.Comment: Suma de gastos legales y de artículos de limpieza

PAR.Name: xclog
PAR.Comment: Gasto artículos de limpieza, la variable tiene otro nombre en 2019

PAR.Name: xhiog
PAR.Comment: Gastos legales y de seguro, la variable tiene otro nombe en 2019

PAR.Name: bfacc01
PAR.Comment: Bonos o transferencias relativas a la familia - Prenatal y lactancia

PAR.Name: bfacc02
PAR.Comment: Bonos o transferencias relativas a la familia - Subsidio Universal de Salud

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Each member of thehousehold forms own unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

PAR.Name: PartnerCond
PAR.Comment: Default = head:idperson=idpartner i.e. one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: RC-IVA is the difference between the 13% of the employee total income minus two minimun wages an the 13% of two minimun wages.

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: RC-IVA is the difference between the 13% of the employee total income minus two minimun wages an the 13% of two minimun wages.

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: RC-IVA is the difference between the 13% of the employee total income minus two minimun wages an the 13% of two minimun wages.

PAR.Name: Var
PAR.Comment: Poverty line: Weighted average between urban and rural poverty lines

PAR.Name: Var
PAR.Comment: Poverty line (post-fiscal): Weighted average between urban and rural poverty lines

PAR.Name: $BSAJuanaAzurduyBirth
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus - Mother (Birth at public health facilities)

PAR.Name: $BSARentaDignidadSP
PAR.Comment: Old Age pension for NON-contributors to social security

PAR.Name: $BSARentaDignidadCP
PAR.Comment: Old Age pension for contributors to social security

PAR.Name: $SICThreshold1
PAR.Comment: Special Contribution (Aporte Nacional Solidario) - Total income greater than 13.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: $SICThreshold2
PAR.Comment: Special Contribution (Aporte Nacional Solidario) - Total income greater than 25.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: $SICThreshold3
PAR.Comment: Special Contribution (Aporte Nacional Solidario) - Total income greater than 35.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: $BSAJuanaAzurduyControl
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus - Mother (4 Prenatal controls)

PAR.Name: $BSAJuanaAzurduyChild
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus - Child (Bi-monthly health checks until two years)

PAR.Name: $LGP_price
PAR.Comment: LGP price in national currency - A LGP container of 10kg

PAR.Name: $Pipegas_CH
PAR.Comment: Gas price through pipes (Chuquisaca) - Price by cubic meter

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Employees who earn more than 13.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Employees who earn more than 25.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Employees who earn more than 35.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Self-employed who earn more than 13.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Self-employed who earn more than 25.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Self-employed who earn more than 35.000 Bs.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Calculate the before tax expenditure for standard rated items. The difference between the before tax and after tax total expenditures is the amount paid in VAT

PAR.Name: x0512
PAR.Comment: Repair, installation and hire of furniture, and furnishings

PAR.Name: x0314
PAR.Comment: Cleaning, repair, tailoring, and hire of clothing

PAR.Name: x0723
PAR.Comment: Maintenance and repair of personal transport equipment

PAR.Name: x0641
PAR.Comment: Expenditures - Diagnostic imaging services and medical laboratory services

PAR.Name: x0631
PAR.Comment: Expenditures - Inpatient curative and rehabilitive services

PAR.Name: x0814
PAR.Comment: Equipment for reception, recoding and reproduction of sound and vision

PAR.Name: x0531
PAR.Comment: Major household appliances, wheter electric or not

PAR.Name: x0312
PAR.Comment: Other artiles of clothing and clothing accesories

PAR.Name: x0833
PAR.Comment: Internet access provision services and net storage services

PAR.Name: x0961
PAR.Comment: Services provided by cinemas, theatres and concert venues

PAR.Name: x1313
PAR.Comment: Hairdressing salons and personal grooming establishments

PAR.Name: x1312
PAR.Comment: Other appliances, articles and products for personal care

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are children and teenagers from 1st. to 12th grade under 21 that are enrolled in public education. People of any age that are enrolled in alternative or special education systems are eligible too.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women between 13 and 50 who are non-contributors to Social Security.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 50 Bs. for each prenatal control (4).

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 125 Bs. for each bi-monthly health check until 2 years.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women who give birth at public health facilities.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 120 Bs. for give birth at public health facilities.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are children under 2 years whose mothers are non-contributors to Social Security

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are non-contributors to social security.

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC non-contributors is 3.250 Bs annual (2015) / 4.550 Bs annual (2019).

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC contributors is 2.600 Bs annual (2015) / 3.900 Bs annual (2019).

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are contributors to social security.

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: All SIC Pension and AFP Contributions

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: This tax is applied considering that the self employed use half of his or her income to pay business-related expenses.

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: In 2019, a new threshold was enacted.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are students enroled in public and private schools and high schools (from 1st to 12th grade)

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 500 Bs.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are beneficiaries of Renta Dignidad and Juana Azurduy Bond

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 400 Bs.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years of age not affiliated to Social Security and not enroled in any other bond.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 500 Bs.

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years old which are receiving the Universal Bond or the Juana Azurduy Bond and are not enrolled or have received the Family Bond. This bond could also be received by people with disabilities and people that are not enrolled in social security. This bond will also be available for independent workers enrolled in social security.

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 1000 Bs.

PAR.Name: brwot_s
PAR.Comment: Bono contra el Hambre - Post COVID assistance

PAR.Name: ils_dispy
PAR.Comment: Same as ils_dispy because own produce is part of original income according to Statistical Office

PAR.Name: xhh_s
PAR.Comment: Adjusted consumption by difference between disposable income in current and base year

PAR.Name: ils_dispyx
PAR.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

PAR.Name: x0123
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Tea, mat'e and other plant products for infusion

PAR.Name: x0119
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Ready-made food and other food products

PAR.Name: x0114
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Milk, other dairy products and eggs

PAR.Name: x0723
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Maintenance and repair of personal transport equipment

PAR.Name: x0722
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Fuels and lubricants for personal transport equipment

PAR.Name: x1313
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Hairdressing salons and personal grooming establishments

PAR.Name: x1312
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Other appliances, articles and products for personal care

PAR.Name: x1221
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Financial intermediation services indirectly measured

PAR.Name: x1222
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Explicit charges by deposit-taking corporations

PAR.Name: x1111
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Restaurants, cafés and the like

PAR.Name: x0814
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Equipment for reception, recoding and reproduction of sound and vi

PAR.Name: x0839
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Other information and communication services

PAR.Name: x0833
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Internet access provision services and net storage services

PAR.Name: x1050
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Education not defined by level

PAR.Name: x0932
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Pets and products for pets

PAR.Name: x0961
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Services provided by cinemas, theatres and concert venues

PAR.Name: x0641
PAR.Comment: Expenditures - Diagnostic imaging services and medical laboratory services

PAR.Name: x0631
PAR.Comment: Expenditures - Inpatient curative and rehabilitive services

PAR.Name: x0531
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Major household appliances, wheter electric or not

PAR.Name: x0512
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Repair, installation and hire of furniture, and furnishings

PAR.Name: x0540
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Glassware, tableware and household utensils

PAR.Name: x0511
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Furniture, furnishings and loose carpets

PAR.Name: x0562
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Domestic services and household services

PAR.Name: x0432
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Services for the maintenance, repair, and security of the dwelling

PAR.Name: x0411
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Actual rental paid by tenants for main residence

PAR.Name: x0314
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Cleaning, repair, tailoring, and hire of clothing

PAR.Name: x0313
PAR.Comment: Expenditure - Other artiles of clothing and clothing accesories

PAR.Name: $protect_cons
PAR.Comment: An optional constant for the share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock. This is ca. 25% in Sub-Saharan Africa, but can be set to 0%

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income higher than in base year (or the same)

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Assign to a variable for simulated consumption

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income smaller than in hte base year

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Mont Belvieu International Price in national currency and equivalence

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

PAR.Name: #_Amount
PAR.Comment: Natural Gas Delivered to Residential Consumers - eia.gov

SYS_PAR.Value: bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
(bfaot_s=0 & bcaot_s=0 & bsaoa=0 & bmapr=0 & bmacc=0 & bed=0) & (lim=0) & (dag>17 & dag<60)
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
(bfaot_s=0 & bcaot_s=0 & bsaoa=0 & bmapr=0 & bmacc=0 & bed=0) & (lim=0) & (dag>17 & dag<60)
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s
bof01_s + bof03_s + bof04_s + bof05_s + bof06_s + bof07_s + bof08_s + bof09_s + bof10_s

UPIND.Name: $f_minwage
UPIND.Description: Minimum National Salary (monthly), National currency Bs
